page_metadata.bioconda__summary: A fast approximate aligner for long DNA sequences.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: a fast and approximate long read mapper
page_metadata.biotools__summary: MashMap implements a fast and approximate algorithm for computing local alignment boundaries between long DNA sequences. It can be useful for mapping genome assembly or long reads (PacBio/ONT) to reference genome(s). Given a minimum alignment length and an identity threshold for the desired local alignments, Mashmap computes alignment boundaries and identity estimates using k-mers
